source_note: Mock trend data simulating what a real aggregator (e.g. Google Trends, TikTok fashion hashtags, Vogue runway reports) would surface. Updated seasonally.
runway_notes: Y2K and vintage revival continues strong. Leather and denim dominate streetwear. Balletcore is crossing from TikTok into mainstream. Butter yellow is the color of the season — replacing last season's Barbie pink. Quiet luxury neutrals (cashmere beiges, tailored wool) remain a staple for workwear.
